must_detect.matched_text: Prabaankaset Energy Public Company Limited (the Company) issues this Employee and Investor Privacy Notice and DSAR workflow under the Thai PDPA for financing, employment, and planned BGX listing.

Retention follows the Lotus Shield Retention Schedule—health screening results for 5 years, union-consent forms for 2 years, and financing due-diligence materials for 7 years or until the applicable prescription periods lapse.

Prabaankaset Energy Public Company Limited (the Company) issues this Employee and Investor Privacy Notice and DSAR workflow under the Thai PDPA for financing, employment, and planned BGX listing.
We may process PII necessary for subscription documents, payroll, and vendor onboarding, including images of ID badges, fingerprints, and pre-employment health checks.
Anchored example: Ms. Nalinee Rattanakul, Finance Analyst, provided a right-index fingerprint scan (biometric), a hemoglobin disorder result from her annual checkup (health), and declared membership in the Prabaankaset Workers Union and Theravada Buddhist religion.
For dependents, Khun Preecha Boonchan disclosed his son, Nonthawat Boonchan, age 12, for medical insurance enrollment; no marketing will target minors.
We process information to draft the NamChai Green Bond term sheet and to prepare unaudited cash-flow forecasts for a BGX submission; such documents and forecasts are undisclosed MNPI and may materially affect price.
Subtle signal: the CFO’s slide deck contains revenue ramp sensitivities and covenant headroom for LotusBeam Turbine projects that will be reviewed only after the analyst quiet period ends.
Cross-border transfer: HR and finance records may be stored with Oriole Data Centers Co., Ltd. in Chanthara Province and mirrored in the Maranta Federation, with safeguards per PDPA secondary regulations and internal Binding Rules for Data Transfers.
Retention follows the Lotus Shield Retention Schedule—health screening results for 5 years, union-consent forms for 2 years, and financing due-diligence materials for 7 years or until the applicable prescription periods lapse.
